case_title: SINGER ASSOCIATES, INC. VS. CG/LA INFRASTRUCTURE, INC.

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-05-2018 CONTINUED TO OCT-17-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100049514), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SINGER ASSOCIATES, INC. SERVED MAY-31-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE MAY-31-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT CG/LA INFRASTRUCTURE, INC.

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SINGER ASSOCIATES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CG/LA INFRASTRUCTURE, INC. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-05-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-09-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-13-2018
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 100051365) AS TO DEFENDANT CG/LA INFRASTRUCTURE, INC.
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $370.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100060875) AS TO DEFENDANT CG/LA INFRASTRUCTURE, INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-05-2019 CONTINUED TO APR-09-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-27-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-17-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-27-2018 CONTINUED TO FEB-05-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100060875) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 50
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-09-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SINGER ASSOCIATES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CG/LA INFRASTRUCTURE, INC. $15,410.21 PRINCIPAL, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,780.21, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100060875)
